---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve ClassTrack
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 🖼️ Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## 🌍 Environment
- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 20.11.0]
- **Browser**: [e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 125]
- **ClassTrack version / commit**: [e.g., v1.0.0 or commit SHA]

## 📋 Additional Context
Any other context, error logs, or stack traces.
